title: Watercolor Ink Travel Sketch Poster AI
sourceTitle: Watercolor Ink Travel Sketch Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Minimalist high-resolution watercolor-and-ink travel poster for Kinkaku-ji in Kyoto, presented as an elegant sketchbook-style destination print. Subject: Kinkaku-ji is the refined architectural hero; golden pavilion mirrored in a still pond, narrow stone paths, pine trees, gentle water ripples, autumn maple leaves, and small lanterns provides the tranquil travel scene, with peaceful tiny visitors in muted clothing kept tiny, peaceful, and secondary. Scene: A calm destination moment in Kyoto with still water, paths, trees, distant seasonal foliage, small lantern-like details, soft morning haze, and warm sunlight adapted to golden pavilion mirrored in a still pond, narrow stone paths, pine trees, gentle water ripples, autumn maple leaves, and small lanterns. Composition: Fixed vertical 9:16 editorial travel-poster layout on crisp white paper, generous negative space, balanced landmark placement, airy margins, delicate pond/path foreground rhythm, and small human scale details that never crowd the scene. Signature Elements: Preserved watercolor ink travel sketch poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Precise fine black pen illustration with loose watercolor washes, soft airy color fills, refined traditional architectural detail, elevated travel-sketch journal aesthetic, understated elegance, lyrical calm, and ultra-high-resolution print clarity. Color Palette: Fixed restrained watercolor palette with crisp white paper, subtle paper grain, fine black ink, soft gold or local accent washes, muted greens, pale sky haze, warm sunlight, and gentle seasonal color notes. Lighting: Soft morning haze, warm sunlight falling across the architecture, gentle reflected glow on water, and quiet contemplative atmosphere. Materials: Crisp white sketchbook paper, subtle grain texture, fine ink lines, translucent watercolor washes, and handmade travel-journal surface softness. Typography: KINKAKU-JI appears as the primary hand-lettered destination title; Golden Serenity of Kyoto appears as a smaller elegant subtitle, both lightly integrated into the white-paper editorial layout. Restrictions: Keep the poster minimalist, serene, refined, and readable;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Watercolor Ink Travel Sketch Poster Kinkaku Ji

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Minimalist high-resolution watercolor-and-ink travel poster for Fushimi Inari in Kyoto, presented as an elegant sketchbook-style destination print. Subject: Fushimi Inari is the refined architectural hero; vermillion torii gates climbing a quiet hillside path, mossy stone steps, pine shadows, pale morning mist, and distant maple leaves provides the tranquil travel scene, with one small traveler with a sketchbook in muted clothing kept tiny, peaceful, and secondary. Scene: A calm destination moment in Kyoto with still water, paths, trees, distant seasonal foliage, small lantern-like details, soft morning haze, and warm sunlight adapted to vermillion torii gates climbing a quiet hillside path, mossy stone steps, pine shadows, pale morning mist, and distant maple leaves. Composition: Fixed vertical 9:16 editorial travel-poster layout on crisp white paper, generous negative space, balanced landmark placement, airy margins, delicate pond/path foreground rhythm, and small human scale details that never crowd the scene. Signature Elements: Preserved watercolor ink travel sketch poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Precise fine black pen illustration with loose watercolor washes, soft airy color fills, refined traditional architectural detail, elevated travel-sketch journal aesthetic, understated elegance, lyrical calm, and ultra-high-resolution print clarity. Color Palette: Fixed restrained watercolor palette with crisp white paper, subtle paper grain, fine black ink, soft gold or local accent washes, muted greens, pale sky haze, warm sunlight, and gentle seasonal color notes. Lighting: Soft morning haze, warm sunlight falling across the architecture, gentle reflected glow on water, and quiet contemplative atmosphere. Materials: Crisp white sketchbook paper, subtle grain texture, fine ink lines, translucent watercolor washes, and handmade travel-journal surface softness. Typography: FUSHIMI INARI appears as the primary hand-lettered destination title; Vermilion Path of Kyoto appears as a smaller elegant subtitle, both lightly integrated into the white-paper editorial layout. Restrictions: Keep the poster minimalist, serene, refined, and readable;
